question: Extend the `Book` class to include a parameterized constructor that accepts and initializes `title`, `author`, and `isbn` upon object creation. Demonstrate its usage.

test_cases.input: Book("The Lord of the Rings", "J.R.R. Tolkien", "978-0618053267") and then display()
test_cases.expected:
Title: The Lord of the Rings
Author: J.R.R. Tolkien
ISBN: 978-0618053267

errors: The parameterized constructor initializes 'author' and 'isbn' with the 'title' parameter instead of their respective 'author' and 'isbn' parameters, leading to incorrect object state.
